case_title: FLORDELINO MATEO VS. TOM P. FOAKES et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATEO, FLORDELINO AS TO DEFENDANT FOAKES, TOM P. DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT FOAKES, TOM P. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
ORDER GRANTING ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FOAKES, TOM P.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; POINTS & AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT; DELCARATION OF HARRISON MAN, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATEO, FLORDELINO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FOAKES, TOM P.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATEO, FLORDELINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOAKES, TOM P. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 700 BRAZIL AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO $8,599.95 RENT, $373.31 DAILY RENTAL DAMAGES NOV-16-05 THROUGH NOV-22-05, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,973.26, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL ALSO HAVE A MONEY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
